properties.name: Hetauda-Dhalkebar-Inaruwa 400 kV backbone
properties.source_note: NEA annual report FY 2024/25 line inventory; World Bank HDDTL RAP Figure 1.
properties.importance: Core 400 kV east-west transfer spine and the backbone behind large-scale export readiness.
properties.geometry_basis: Indicative substation spine using official line names and geocoded grid nodes.

properties.name: Hetauda-Bharatpur-Bardaghat 220 kV corridor
properties.source_note: NEA annual report FY 2024/25 existing 220 kV line inventory.
properties.importance: Main central-to-western transfer corridor tying Hetauda load and export centers to the west.
properties.geometry_basis: Indicative substation spine using official line names and geocoded grid nodes.

properties.name: Khimti-Dhalkebar 220 kV hydro corridor
properties.source_note: NEA annual report FY 2024/25 existing 220 kV line inventory.
properties.importance: Eastern hill hydropower evacuation path into the Dhalkebar hub.
properties.geometry_basis: Indicative substation spine using official line names and geocoded grid nodes.

properties.name: Solu Corridor Tingla-Mirchaiya 132 kV
properties.source_note: NEA Grid 2076 and NEA annual report FY 2024/25.
properties.importance: Dedicated eastern evacuation corridor for Solu basin projects.
properties.geometry_basis: Indicative spine between the named terminal substations in official NEA documents.

properties.name: Dana-Kushma-New Butwal 220 kV corridor
properties.source_note: NEA annual report FY 2024/25 existing 220 kV line inventory.
properties.importance: Key Kali Gandaki / western Gandaki evacuation route into the Butwal node.
properties.geometry_basis: Indicative substation spine using official line names and geocoded grid nodes.

properties.name: Udipur-Damauli-Bharatpur 220 kV reinforcement
properties.source_note: NEA annual report FY 2024/25 under-construction tables and NEA tender/award references for the Marsyangdi corridor.
properties.importance: Mid-western reinforcement for the Marsyangdi / Lamjung hydro cluster into the Bharatpur load-transfer zone.
properties.geometry_basis: Indicative corridor spine based on named substations and reinforcement packages.

properties.name: Lapsiphedi-Ratmate-Hetauda-Damauli-Butwal 400 kV central corridor
properties.source_note: MCA-Nepal alignment maps and ADB SASEC operational plan update; Ratmate is the current hub nomenclature.
properties.importance: High-priority central 400 kV expansion meant to unlock new export and domestic transfer capacity.
properties.geometry_basis: Indicative compact spine using MCA current segment names and geocoded hub nodes.
